site.title: International Accessibility Task Force (Task Force wan ijjuch daɣ alɣalim)
site.tagline: Daɣ derhan n ijjuch s repo tan win alxakum
nav.label: Wa ezzaran
hero.home.eyebrow: Open Source Accessibility (tudabat n ijjuch n alkittab)
meta.home.description: IATF izjar id derhan win tiditt n ijjuch daɣ repository tan n open source
meta.projects.description: Akayad fal addabara tan win ijjuch n addinat iktaban s IATF
meta.propose.description: Iddikud n addabara wan ijjuch daɣ IATF s web, e-mail meɣ Discord
meta.governance.description: Əlkəttab fal alməɣna was IATF itaj iruman, itaj iketan, izar itaj ašəɣəlan adinat.
meta.join.description: Ihandagan n ijjuch n IATF: edey n kod, afissar, erem meɣ ag-az n addabara
meta.accessibility.description: Əmik was IATF isaknen ye agaraw ən adakal ən sitan wən intanedǎɣ əd əmik was adobat adigiš adabaratan ən aśahat ən ugiš.
meta.transparency.description: Ikitban win alxakum n IATF: addabara tan, addabaratan d isalan wi ewadnen aqqalan a ijjan daɣ almaɣna
actions.emailProjects: E-mail tan n asuj tan inbox
registry.empty.title: War illenat har ajjudi addabara tan
registry.empty.body: IATF eɣna id tartit net ta tazzarat n alxidmat tan addinat
proposal.form.title: Erem n tiɣaymit
proposal.form.body: Edey dumu wan sider i asissiki n addaror i IATF
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript ilzam ti axadam n web form wen. A fal war ilen, exdam s email meɣ Discord
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Aliɣi ən tidit war eqel amsədu dǎɣ ehan wen. Adakal wen ad aliɣi emag ən e-mail iness.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Ikna turhajat n ijjuch n alɣillas
proposal.form.ready: Alwaq wa id isakninat addaror, IATF ad eqqil iddikud n asidu
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Alxdm ijjit n awikkil n spam data azzăman
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Alɣillas n spam ewad alwaq net n axadam
proposal.form.turnstileError: Wǎr addobǎt awǎyǎd asukni n spam daɣ amaradǎt. Alxdǎm erem iyyan
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Alɣillas n spam ewad azzaman net
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Əlkəttab dǎɣ dagan wi atiwazaynen dat ugiš.
proposal.form.submitting: Alwaq wa id eway id asafar
proposal.form.success: Ahadəm, adabaratan in aqalan atwagrawan əd aqiman fal akayad.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Alwaq wa id itawaɣir id IATF har ajjudi fal ardabat wen, erha isuj win sider
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Ille harat war n oɣed daɣ asissiki n addaror. Alxer erem iyyan. A fal muchakil ilkamat, axadam s e-mail a fal ijja awen
project.detail.whyTitle: Awa fal id eqqal addabara wen
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Eɣanni n tangilist raqqosat, afissaran addoben a tan ijjichan darat awa
footer.label: Edag wan sider n sit
footer.howToContribute: Awa s addobat awadim aharoj net
footer.blurb: Alxidmat tan ijjuch ilzam as a taqqil a oɣadan daɣ asinti net, a ojjaran intaj net tolas a taqqal a oharan alɣillas net
footer.source: Almaɣna n ichiritan win ijjuch: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Əšiɣilan atiwasanan fal amitkalan ən təmusnawen atiwafanen.
contact.label: Əmigridan
project.status.seeking-maintainer: Eɣri n awadim wa ijjanen alxidmat
translation.label: Talɣa n afissar
translation.source: Anglais eqqal awal wan canonical i sit wen
translation.humanReviewed: Əlkitab wen eqal ayktaban əs magrad ahusken.
translation.machineAssisted: Awen afissar idhal s maršin tolas war eqqel har ajjudi amasuɣil n awadim olaɣan daɣ awal net
translation.needsUpdate: Əlkitab wen eqal ayktaban dat təmuqunt təšrayat tan anglais əd adobat adiqil ayfan adigriwan.
translation.report: Alil ən asostanan ən afanaz: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Eqal awendǎɣ .
